props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the tooltip container.

props.name: getTrack
props.description:
Function that returns the element the tooltip points to.
Can return null if the element is not yet mounted or available.

props.name: position
props.description: Determines where the tooltip is displayed when opened, relative to the trigger. If the tooltip doesn't have enough space to open in this direction, it automatically chooses a better direction based on available space.

slots.name: content
slots.description: Content to display in the tooltip
